refs.description: Clean, well-documented reference implementation of BFS over an adjacency-list graph with a queue and visited set.
Production BFS family (bfs_edges, bfs_tree, bfs_layers) in the widely used NetworkX graph library.
Uses BFS internally to compute single-source shortest paths and path lengths in unweighted graphs.
Uses BFS to enumerate connected components by traversing each unvisited node's reachable set.
